{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316400616B800A46D266D2337EB"}"},"total":4767},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450451093491843864","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本来一直以为无女主就是不停的杀杀杀，看到现在才理解无女主的真正含义，能让主角更丰富立体，让更多情感突出，挺好挺好[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734696888,"group_id":"7423219348401048638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"正义的奥特曼最终会和小怪兽幸福生活","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/GaiApctH3DnA1oeNANUAxS8UXWPWXBsfnm1N4mB56Z","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/710df04759ca4f288ca9ca65e4ecf2d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787610&x-signature=7AJEQpirz6s%2B5dC9kKPuPxsWBjk%3D","user_id":"2982348291840829","user_name":"绘梨衣\("},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2982348291840829","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423219348401048638","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神同人+无女主+开局至高神】
穿越斩神世界，江野成为了主角林七夜的邻居。

　　但是江野自生下来就普普通通，没有觉醒任何禁墟，甚至连穿越者必备的金手指都没有。

　　他为了又能力活下去，于是谋划了一场欺诈神明的骗局。

　　然而，就在炽天使差点选择江野当代理人的时候，还是被发现了。

　　炽天使：“凡人，你也配当本神的代理。胆敢欺诈本神，今日就毁去你的双眼。”

　　就这样，江野不仅被炽天使嫌弃，从此也失去了双眼，黑暗笼罩着人生开始了。

　　就在盖亚利用【湿婆怨】毁灭沧南之时。

　　【叮！剧情魔改系统觉醒成功】

　　【系统开局奖励：

　　宿主直升至高神，掌控万象法则。】

　　【宿主可以通过改变原有剧情，获得魔改值提升至升维者！】

　　开局就是至高神，我不无敌谁无敌？

　　……

　　多年后，江野依靠魔改剧情，成就升维者，登上月球之巅。

　　他手持长刀，黑带缠目，面向曾经嫌弃，毁去他双眼的炽天使米迦勒。

　　“米迦勒，当初你毁我双眼，今日该偿还了。”

　　炽天使米迦勒看到曾经瞧不起的江野，如今超越至高，达到了升维者！

　　他肠子都悔清了

"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":63,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3978,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19527,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":34875},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542898744840274712","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部小说是斩神同人文中的极品，他塑造了一个热血少年的形象和情节，十分风趣有味。作者显得十分和蔼可亲，情节仿佛融入现实，深入人心，动容之处，并会跟着情节突出情感来。情节中悲伤读者悲伤情节中高兴读者高兴，这说明作者的技艺已经到达出神入化的级别，情感是一块定心丸，你能把握读者的情感，便能写出一本好的小说，加油！难若惊鸿，我相信你能创作更好的小说！","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742552066D2337EB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227542898744840274712%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227423219348401048638%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756221684,"group_id":"7423219348401048638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一日只写几个字，啥也不会┐（─__─）┌","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyNPYb4GVSrASgE82MC6HEACKsE0WXAX9B1ivWqSbPq1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4098598896415112","user_name":"仙长写书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4098598896415112","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title "reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":177583,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":180067,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":11612},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7513928075183489854","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从个人角度看，《斩神：七岁至高神，震惊世界众神》挺对我胃口！
 
设定太香了，穿越+系统+无女主，七岁就成至高神，开局直接拉满爽感 ，看主角在斩神世界搞事情，那种碾压众神的剧情，读着超带劲，很解压！
 
节奏也给力，更新到六百多章，追更时能一直有新情节，不会断档无聊。而且评分 9.4、二十多万人在读，说明大家眼光差不多，跟着大部队追文，就感觉找对组织啦～
 
不过也有点小担心，怕后面剧情重复、走套路，要是能一直保持现在的创新和爽感，绝对能成为我长期追更的宝藏文，希望作者稳住，别让咱这些追更的读者失望呀！","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":8,"text":"斩神：七岁至高神，震惊世界众神","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%9A%E4%B8%83%E5%B2%81%E8%87%B3%E9%AB%98%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%87%E6%83%8A%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%E4%BC%97%E7%A5%9E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742552066D2337EB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227513928075183489854%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227423219348401048638%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%9A%E4%B8%83%E5%B2%81%E8%87%B3%E9%AB%98%E7%A5%9E%EF%BC%8C%E9%9C%87%E6%83%8A%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%E4%BC%97%E7%A5%9E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749479597,"group_id":"7423219348401048638","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Hr4nad7z+B+xWLCj0TdhYZivFXuyIvPbmywG/YnUK7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b200194311348359465507d44302f26~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794887&x-signature=i8od9nGESlvyl%2BRWIvGrqzhqPrA%3D","user_id":"3021917162837675","user_name":"晚风藏月色"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3021917162837675","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423219348401048638","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神同人+无女主+开局至高神】
